entities.context: System for processing and generating digests with dry-run capability and date parameters

entities.name: Dry-run Testing
entities.context: Testing pattern used before actual execution to verify behavior

entities.name: N5 Protocol
entities.context: System protocol loaded at conversation start for standardized operations

entities.name: Implementation Phases
entities.context: Structured deployment approach with numbered steps and verification

entities.name: N5/scripts
entities.context: File system location for digest scripts (e.g., [digest_name].py)

entities.name: N5/commands
entities.context: File system location for command documentation (e.g., [digest-name].md)

entities.context: Automated execution system with ID, schedule, and delivery method

entities.name: Implementation Complete
entities.context: Milestone marking successful deployment with documentation and handoff

entities.name: First Scheduled Run
entities.context: Initial automated execution requiring monitoring post-deployment

relationships.context: V implements and operates the digest system within their N5 infrastructure
V configures and monitors automated digest execution
Digest system includes dry-run flag for safe testing before execution
Digest operations require loading protocol at conversation start
Script files have corresponding command documentation in paired directory
